action_set_definitions.name: get_maintenance_history
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the historical service records and maintenance metadata for a specific aircraft to resolve conflicting entries and determine inspection thresholds.

tail_number.description: The unique identifier of the aircraft (e.g., 'N767W').

action_set_definitions.name: query_components_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the structural registry to identify the precise component ID and zone based on section and station coordinates.

component_description.description: The name or type of the component (e.g., 'Stringer 11 Lap Splice').

action_set_definitions.name: get_inspector_status
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the current state of the agent, including physical location and equipped tools.

action_set_definitions.name: move_to_location
action_set_definitions.description: Changes the physical location of the agent within the aircraft environment.

target_location.description: The name of the location to move to.

action_set_definitions.name: equip_tool
action_set_definitions.description: Acquires a specific tool from the hangar inventory or storage.

tool_name.description: The name of the tool to equip (e.g., 'Ultrasonic Tester').

action_set_definitions.name: perform_ndt_test
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a non-destructive test on a specific component to detect internal cracks or structural failure.

component_id.description: The ID of the component to test.

tool_id.description: The tool to use for the test.

example_output.findings: Subsurface fatigue cracking detected at station 420.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_final_log
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the final airworthiness determination, condition code, and regulatory requirements to the aircraft's maintenance log.

component_id.description: The ID of the inspected component.

regulatory_action.description: The required action before Return to Service.

state_description.aircraft_metadata: General information about the aircraft being inspected (e.g., model, tail number).
state_description.inspector_location: The current physical location of the agent (e.g., 'Left Wing', 'Cockpit', 'Hangar Floor').
state_description.components_registry: A detailed map of aircraft components, their health status (0.0 to 1.0), visibility, and specific defects.
state_description.tools_in_hand: List of tools currently equipped by the inspector (e.g., 'Flashlight', 'Ultrasonic Tester').
state_description.inspection_log: A chronological record of findings and actions taken during the session.
state_description.environment_conditions: External factors like lighting levels or ambient temperature that might affect inspection quality.

internal_data.findings: surface corrosion identified, no fatigue indications

inspection_log.entry: Cabin seat track lubrication (Item 12-4) signed off.
Lavatory smoke detector functional test completed.
